notes: All steps anchor to the outer presenter frame (cross-origin survey editor iframe cannot be interacted with). Steps 3-7 show the Surveys dashboard; VO carries the editor-specific context. Clips placed at step boundaries with natural continuation across step transitions.

steps.display_text: AhaSlides Surveys is a standalone form builder. Share a link — no live session needed.
steps.tts_text: AhaSlides Surveys is a standalone form builder. Share a link — no live session needed.

steps.display_text: Here's the Surveys dashboard — see all your surveys, then create one from scratch, a template, or A.I.
steps.tts_text: Here's the Surveys dashboard — see all your surveys, then create one from scratch, a template, or A.I.

steps.display_text: Pages are in the left panel. Each page holds multiple questions.
steps.tts_text: Pages are in the left panel. Each page holds multiple questions.

steps.display_text: Add question — pick from six types.
steps.tts_text: Add question — pick from six types.

steps.display_text: Settings on the right. Choose icon style, set the count, mark required.
steps.tts_text: Settings on the right. Choose icon style, set the count, mark required.

steps.display_text: Preview the respondent view, Publish, and share the link.
steps.tts_text: Preview the respondent view, Publish, and share the link.
